rationale: The citing paper’s Study 1 explicitly uses an incentive-compatible Becker-DeGroot-Marschak (BDM) mechanism to elicit WTP in a field setting, and the cited 2002 JMR paper’s core contribution is establishing/validating BDM for point-of-purchase WTP measurement. This is a plausible methodological/foundational citation rather than an incidental mention, so it merits full relation judgment.
